name: Baked Squash
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Nonfat dry buttermilk (or Nonfat dry milk or the vegan equivalent)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together oat bran, dry milk, orange peel, and pumpkin pie seasoning.
2. Whisk in squash and maple syrup.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit in a large rectangular pan (I use glass) for about an hour.
4. Serve hot or cold.
Notes:
1. I buy oat bran in bulk. Toast it at 350 degrees Fahrenheit on a cookie sheet with edges, stirring every 10 minutes until light brown. Add the orange peel during this process and store it in the refrigerator. Do not add the orange peel before toasting, as it will burn.
2. This recipe can be made with various types of squash or sweet potatoes; they are all good. Frozen squash is simply the easiest option.
3. The original recipe calls for cinnamon, but I prefer the taste of pumpkin pie spice. Plain cloves were not used as they did not suit the flavor profile.
